mfa.description: Add an extra layer of security using an authenticator app.
mfa.enroll.instructions: Enter this setup key in your authenticator app, then type the 6-digit code it generates to confirm.
mfa.enroll.title: Set up authenticator app
mfa.error.requires_recent_login: Please sign out and sign in again before changing two-factor settings.
mfa.error.unknown: Something went wrong. Please try again.
mfa.title: Two-factor authentication
